digest.component_or_area: optional ticket audit-trail web UI (rebar audit serve)
propositions: Auditors need a read-only per-ticket view of what the LLM plan-review, completion-verification, and code-review gates decided, with ticket details alongside.
The UI must render each review's full four-pass breakdown (findings, verification, determination with per-finding resolved thresholds, coaching) and the completion criteria[] rows.
The page must be navigable across retained plan-review and code-review history so an older round of each gate can be selected and renders distinct content.
The feature is optional and disabled by default, delivered as a lazy-imported nava-rebar[ui] extra bound to loopback, inert when disabled or absent so import rebar is unaffected.
The UI is a pure consumer of enriched fields delivered by the data-enrichment epic (Epic 1) via a shared named interface and must not render a region until its field source has landed.
block_threshold is a per-finding resolved value each finding was judged against, not a round-level scalar.
